---
title: "Living SEB Skills Results"
description: "This post links to the interactive results page hosted in the living SEB skills repository."
date: 2026-03-10
categories: ["SEB", "review", "living review"]
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=https://feracotommaso.github.io/living_SEB_review/paper/livingSEBresults.html">
---

This post redirects to the external page.

[Open the page directly](https://feracotommaso.github.io/living_SEB_review/paper/livingSEBresults.html)
